title: Romantic Earthy Polish Pilaf
description: A hearty, earthy pilaf dish infused with romantic flavors of Eastern Europe, perfect for a cozy evening.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add sliced sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add sliced mushrooms and cook until tender, about 3 minutes.
Add chopped scallions and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in caraway seeds, salt, and black pepper.
Add pilaf and stir to combine.
Transfer mixture to a serving dish and top with crumbled feta cheese.
Cook time can be reduced by using pre-cooked sausage.
Pilaf can be cooked separately and added to the skillet in the final step.
